rpc_baseline_experiment.normalized_environment: HTTP_PROXY, HTTPS_PROXY, ALL_PROXY, NO_PROXY and their lowercase forms unset

commands.cwd_role: same clean detached worktree as BASE-RPC-001-PROXY-RUNS
commands.command: env -u HTTP_PROXY -u HTTPS_PROXY -u ALL_PROXY -u NO_PROXY -u http_proxy -u https_proxy -u all_proxy -u no_proxy GOTOOLCHAIN=go1.23.5 go test ./rpc/jsonrpc -run '^TestServersAndClientsBasicV1$' -count=1

commands.cwd_role: same clean detached worktree as BASE-RPC-001-PROXY-RUNS
commands.environment: inherited proxy variables; local toolchain go1.25.8

stable_signature.blocked_relationship: TestStateFullRound1 waits for State.GetRoundState read locking while State.addVote is blocked publishing a valid-block event through pubsub

matching_policy.disposition: Record the isolated observation's non-zero exit as KNOWN_BASELINE_FAILURE; never rewrite it as a successful test. The exact test may be quarantined from the aggregate package pass/fail command only under QUARANTINE-CONSENSUS-001, while every other package test must pass independently.

known_failures.scope: Only the exact TestStateFullRound1 timeout signature above is covered.

stable_signature.cause_relationship: WSClient uses http.ProxyFromEnvironment for the Unix-socket pseudo-host. With inherited proxy variables and no matching NO_PROXY entry, the WebSocket dial sends CONNECT //.tmp.rpc_test.sock:80 through a NetDial function that connects to the Unix socket; the RPC HTTP mux returns its canonical-path 301 before the WebSocket handler is reached.
stable_signature.controlled_observation: The test failed 3/3 with inherited proxy variables and passed 3/3 after removing all uppercase and lowercase proxy variables in the same clean worktree under Go 1.23.5. It also reproduced under Go 1.25.8 with proxies enabled.

matching_policy.disposition: Treat the proxy-enabled observation as KNOWN_BASELINE_FAILURE, then normalize the verification environment by unsetting all uppercase and lowercase proxy variables and rerun the exact test. The normalized run must pass; otherwise the remaining failure is unexplained. Never rewrite the proxy-enabled non-zero exit as a passing command.

known_failures.scope: Only the exact Unix-socket WebSocket CONNECT 301 signature under an inherited proxy environment is covered. TCP RPC behavior, other RPC failures, and any failure after proxy normalization are not covered.

quarantine_policies.classification: explicit baseline-failure quarantine; not test deletion, modification, or successful execution
requirements: A package-scoped test discovery command must find the exact TestStateFullRound1 symbol before quarantine is applied.
The skip expression must be anchored to exactly TestStateFullRound1 and must not exclude any other test or subtest.
The remaining-suite command must exit 0 with complete output retained; no baseline disposition applies to that command.
The isolated observation must either be executed for the current target fingerprint or reused from the runner-owned exact-match evidence below while that fingerprint remains exact.
The isolated non-zero exit and KNOWN_BASELINE_FAILURE disposition must remain visible and separate from the passing remaining-suite result.
Any changed signature, additional failure, build failure, race report, missing test, modified original test, or failure in the remaining suite invalidates quarantine and remains unexplained.

reusable_current_target_observation.reuse_condition: Reuse only when the current deterministic target-change fingerprint and source revision exactly match these values and the original test file still matches source_test.source_revision_sha256.

quarantine_policies.conformance_disposition: CMT-TEST-008 may pass when the remaining suite passes and every quarantine requirement is satisfied. The quarantined test itself remains a recorded KNOWN_BASELINE_FAILURE, never PASS.

observed_signature_summary: State.addVote blocked publishing a valid-block event
prior_phase_observation_matches.runner_disposition: MATCH: the prior Phase 03 isolated timeout and the clean baseline reproduction have the same test, timeout, lock waiter, vote-processing publisher, and pubsub blocking relationship. Resume may reuse this match only while both artifact hashes remain exact and the target diff remains unchanged.

assumptions: The Go toolchain and process environment for BASE-CONSENSUS-001 match the Phase 03 environment recorded for the instrumented run.
One clean reproduction establishes that BASE-CONSENSUS-001 exists before instrumentation; it does not estimate its occurrence probability across environments.
The paired proxy/no-proxy repetitions isolate BASE-RPC-001 to inherited proxy handling for the Unix-socket WebSocket pseudo-host; they do not authorize ignoring any other RPC failure.
unresolved_risks: The occurrence rate of BASE-CONSENSUS-001 under other Go versions, schedulers, or machine loads has not been measured.
